completed_commits.message: chore: initialize project repository with README and .gitignore
chore: set up monorepo structure with frontend and backend directories
chore: add MIT license file
chore: configure ESLint and Prettier for consistent code formatting
chore: add .editorconfig for cross-editor consistency
chore: set up Husky pre-commit hooks
chore: configure lint-staged for pre-commit linting
chore: add commitlint to enforce conventional commit messages
chore: initialize npm workspaces for monorepo package management
chore: add .nvmrc specifying Node.js version 20
chore: configure VS Code workspace settings and recommended extensions
chore: add Docker and Docker Compose configuration files
chore: create initial project documentation structure
chore: set up environment variable templates (.env.example)
chore: add CONTRIBUTING.md with development guidelines
chore: add CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
chore: configure Dependabot for automated dependency updates
chore: add GitHub issue and pull request templates
chore: initialize CHANGELOG.md following keep-a-changelog format
chore: add security policy (SECURITY.md)
chore: initialize React application with Vite
chore: configure TypeScript with strict mode
chore: set up Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
chore: add React Router for client-side routing
chore: configure Zustand for global state management
chore: integrate React Query for server state management
